title: Skills
description: Manage your AI writing skills with custom triggers and instructions
discoverDescription: Browse and add community-shared writing skills

batch.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected skills? This action cannot be undone.

form.name: Skill Name
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe what this skill does
form.instructionsPlaceholder: When this skill is triggered, AI will follow these instructions...
form.instructionsHint: Supports Markdown format: headings, lists, code blocks, etc.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Skill
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete this skill? This action cannot be undone.

share.title: Share Skill
share.notice: After sharing, your skill will be submitted for review. Once approved, it will appear in the public skill library.
share.error: Failed to share. Please try again later.

quota.createDescription: You've reached the custom skill limit for your current plan. Upgrade your plan, or compare plans before deciding.
